'''Derillium mines''' were proximity [[Space mine/Legends|space mines]] that were activated when an enemy ship approached. Derillium mines where deployed in limited numbers due to their destructive force. When a ship passed within a predetermined range, ranging anywhere from 0-100 meters, the mine would explode violently with enough force to destroy even the toughest [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]], and cripple larger star ships. The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] had planted such mines along the [[Arah asteroid belt]] in order to protect the [[Arah mining facility]] from intruders and spies.

Due to a minor programming bug, two mines laying next to each other, one could destroy the other if an experienced pilot quickly passed between them.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Rebel Assault II: The Hidden Empire]]''
